risk_assessment.implementation: Three-layer verification stack identifies risks at kernel (eBPF), policy (OPA), and formal (Z3) levels

ai_system_lifecycle.description: Management of AI system throughout its lifecycle
ai_system_lifecycle.implementation: Continuous monitoring via cron (daily 04:00 audit), real-time policy evaluation, formal verification of outputs

transparency.description: AI system decisions shall be explainable
transparency.implementation: Every policy decision includes human-readable reasons. Every Z3 verification includes proof or counterexample

audit_trail.description: Tamper-evident record of all AI system actions
audit_trail.implementation: HMAC-SHA256 chain — each event hashed with previous hash
